question: Give me all the performances in which a composer interprets his or her works
sparql:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?performance WHERE { 
  ?performance a efrbroo:F31_Performance .
  ?performance efrbroo:R25_performed ?performer .
  ?performance efrbroo:R9i_realises ?work .
  ?work dct:creator ?composer .
  FILTER(?performer = ?composer)
}
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.25s
